name: istyle Inc.
summary: istyle Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates a beauty portal site @cosme in Japan and internationally. The company also provides Internet advertising/marketing services. In addition, it operates @ cosme shopping, a cosmetics e-commerce site and cosmetics specialty store under the @ cosme store name; and wholesales cosmetics. Further, the company operates @ cosme salon, a site that offers hair and beauty salons information; at cosmetics career, a site, which provides job offer services specialized in beauty industry; @cosme blog, a beauty blog site for beauty gurus and professionals to share information. Additionally, it offers A-Beauty, a web magazine catering; @cosme diet, a diet information site that research and find diets; @cosme hairsalon, a site for beauty and hair salon search and booking; Cooking School Park, a site for cooking, baking, and confectionery classes; mognavi, a food information site for storebought food products, restaurant menus, mail-order food products, and more; eatsmart, a food and health site to help develop better eating habits with a calorie checker and a social media health journal; BeautyTech.jp, a digital magazine; HERMO, a cosmetics online retail site; UrCosme, a cosmetics information site; and MakeupAlley, an america's beauty community site. The company was formerly known as I-Style Co., Ltd. and changed its name to istyle Inc. in April 2000. istyle Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
